introSection: Mini Dragon was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari previously located at Rotunda Amusement Park in Folkestone, Kent, England, UK. It is not known what happened to the roller coaster after it left the park.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On 11 September 1999, an eight-year-old girl fell from the train and hit her head on the ride structure. She died in hospital the following day from her injuries. The owners of the park were eventually found guilty. It is not known whether the ride operated after the incident.

fullText:
Mini Dragon was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari previously located at Rotunda Amusement Park in Folkestone, Kent, England, UK. It is not known what happened to the roller coaster after it left the park.

On 11 September 1999, an eight-year-old girl fell from the train and hit her head on the ride structure. She died in hospital the following day from her injuries. The owners of the park were eventually found guilty. It is not known whether the ride operated after the incident.
